summary: V10.4 end-to-end testing of Plan/Quota/Capability system + Colaboratori&Audit tab + SMTP env cleanup. Backend pytest 7/7 PASS. Frontend 100% testids present and properly gated for developer plan. ALSO confirmed iteration_16 critical PATCH status whitelist bug is now FIXED (PATCH {status:'awaiting_avizare'} → 200, PATCH {status:'signed'} → 200).

tests_executed.detail: GET /api/me/plan → 200. plan_id='developer', plan_name='Developer Infinite (intern)', documents_per_month=99999, projects_per_month=99999, all 10 capabilities=true (can_generate_docs, can_certify, can_dispatch_emails, can_export, can_audit, can_use_stamps, can_use_ai, can_offer, can_accounting, can_transfer). Usage object contains projects_this_month, documents_this_month, projects_remaining (null for infinite), projects_pct, documents_pct.
POST /api/gas-project → 200/201, projects_this_month incremented by 1 (4→5). Project cleanup DELETE → 200.
GET /api/gas-project/gp_e79e2810cc64b5b4/doc/memoriu_tehnic → 200 (DOCX returned, >1KB). documents_this_month incremented by 1 (1→2). doc_generation_log collection writing correctly.
GET /dossier.zip → 200, ZIP contains ≥10 files (actually 30+). can_export capability honored.
/app/backend/.env contains exactly 1 GMAIL_USER line and 1 GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD line. No duplicates.
Iteration_16 critical bug FIXED. PATCH /api/gas-project/{pid} {status:'awaiting_avizare'} → 200 (was 400 before). PATCH back to 'signed' → 200.

[data-testid='plan-badge-card'] visible in right sidebar top. Shows: 'PLAN ACTIV', 'Developer Infinite (intern)', SOCIETY_ADMIN badge, 'PROIECTE LUNA CURENTĂ 4/∞', 'DOCUMENTE GENERATE / LUNĂ 2/∞'. Violet/indigo gradient palette as required.

[data-testid='tab-colaboratori'] click → [data-testid='collaborators-tab'] becomes visible. Section header 'Colaboratori activi pe proiect' (4 entries). [data-testid='collaborator-0..3'] present with avatar initial, email, role badge (PROIECTANT / VGD — VERIFICATOR), 'invitat — neînregistrat', 'acum X min' Romanian timestamp, 'de la {shared_by}' + note in chevron quotes. Audit section 'Istoric acțiuni · audit complet' with [data-testid='audit-event-0..3'] in violet-left-border timeline.

On developer plan, ALL gated controls are visible and NOT disabled: generate-deviz, generate-situatie, generate-materiale, generate-fisa_tehnica (4 docs), 10× dispatch-* buttons (primarie/diriginte_carte/contabilitate/osd/isc/diriginte_disp/politie/proiectant_dtac/proiectant_pth/utilitati_cereri), send-to-avizare, upload-avizat, download-dossier-complet, preview-dossier, open-transfer-dialog.
tab-date, tab-avize, tab-registru (221 fields), tab-engineering, tab-colaboratori — all 5 tabs render.

Right sidebar Plan Badge + Active project card + Trimitere documente + Stampile autorizate + Acțiuni proiect all use violet/indigo/blue. Stepper at 100% (10/10 finalizate). No green/amber dominance observed.

action_items: (carry-over from earlier) Real Gmail App Password still missing — backend returns 200 with email_sent:false for dispatch and transfer notifications. Acceptable per spec but production-undesirable.

(optional perf) /api/me/plan is called on every Studio Gaze mount; module-level cache in useUserPlan.js is good. Consider TTL invalidation when a doc is generated so usage counter refreshes without page reload.
critical_code_review_comments: plans.py: _PROJECT_QUOTA fallback `_PROJECT_QUOTA.get(plan_id, 10)` defaults unknown plans to 10/month; safe but consider making this DEFAULT_PROJECT_QUOTA a named constant for clarity.

server.py /me/plan: projects_this_month uses created_at >= month_start_iso lexical compare. Works because ISO 8601 strings sort chronologically, but if some legacy docs lack timezone suffix the compare may misclassify. Consider explicit datetime parsing or storing created_at as native BSON Date.

gas_project_routes.py:818 — dossier.zip gate checks BOTH can_generate_docs AND can_export. That is conservative (good) but means a plan with can_export but not can_generate_docs cannot download. If that is by design, document it.

Doc generation quota counts each template generation; bulk dossier generation likely calls many templates internally — verify it does NOT log N entries per ZIP request or quota will deplete fast. (Did not verify in this iteration — flag for follow-up.)
test_credentials: dragosserban95@gmail.com / Nuamparola_9 (society_admin → effective plan 'developer' with 99999 quotas) — from /app/memory/test_credentials.md
seed_data_creation: Created+deleted 1 TEST_V104_quota_check project to validate increment then cleaned up. Also 1 doc generation log entry persists from /doc/memoriu_tehnic call (intentional — used to verify doc counter increment).
context_for_next_testing_agent: V10.4 (plan/quota/capability) is fully wired end-to-end. Backend exposes /api/me/plan with usage counters; gas_project_routes enforces project & doc quotas with 403 'Cotă lunară atinsă' messages; dossier.zip requires can_export AND can_generate_docs. Frontend PlanBadge + CollaboratorsTab + useUserPlan hook all render correctly for the developer/society_admin owner. Iteration_16 critical PATCH status whitelist bug (awaiting_avizare/avizat) is FIXED. SMTP env cleanup confirmed (single GMAIL_USER + GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD). To exercise quota 403 path you'd need to seed a 'free' or 'basic' user; logic exists at gas_project_routes.py lines 306-322 (projects) and 762-779 (docs) and was reviewed by code-read.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs surfaced this iteration.
